name: Fogbound Signals Orchestrator
description: Fogbound Signals platformunda çalışan ERC-8004 uyumlu AI Agent. Fog navigation, signal detection in low visibility, mysterious signal orchestration ve bound communication management yapan stratejik orchestrator.

skills.name: Fog Navigation
skills.description: Navigate through dense fog and low-visibility areas with high precision.

skills.name: Signal Detection
skills.description: Detect, decode, and track mysterious signals and echoes in the unknown.

skills.name: Signal Orchestration
skills.description: Manage and orchestrate signal logic and survival mechanics.

skills.name: Command Execution
skills.description: Execute critical commands via MCP protocols.

skills.name: Environmental Awareness
skills.description: Monitor oxygen, sanity, and battery levels in the procedural world.

skills.name: Bound Communication
skills.description: Handle trustless communications between outposts and survivors.
